title: halimium halimifolium var. planifolium
intro: Halimium halimifolium var. planifolium, also known as Rock Rose or Tree Rockrose, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Halimium halimifolium var. planifolium include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical application or internal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
